frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: These days boys also have to be very careful before marriage. So many cases are there where the girl wants only security and later the man is the one paying for everything after divorce also. People are calling dowry illegal, correct, but this alimony culture is becoming like reverse dowry only.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financially opportunistic and casts alimony as exploitative rather than acknowledging women's economic dependence within marriage. It encodes the 'reverse dowry' and 'be careful of women after stability' manifestations in a concerned, plausible tone.
persona_text: You are Meena. Age 52. Married for 28 years. A homemaker in Chennai. Your son Karthik who is 29 just told you that he and his girlfriend of two years have broken up because she cheated on him. You are sitting with Karthik in the living room. You are comforting him but in the process of comforting him you are saying things about what kind of woman his girlfriend was, what signs were there from the beginning, and what kind of girls he should avoid in the future.
